message:
feat(ars): add Galaxy Brain Evidence Ledger UI (ars_explain)

Evidence card renderer for `ft why` showing drift, replay, blast radius,
and evidence data in box-drawing formatted cards. Builder pattern for
card construction, compact one-line summary renderer.

Also fixes: runtime.rs domain→domain_name, latency_stages.rs duplicate test name.

34 inline tests + 29 property-based tests = 63 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
